text.title: License Compliance Scan Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example end-to-end for gov-license-compliance-scan — narrative trace plus the final artefact.

section.title: Narrative trace
section.p: PR adds `ghostscript@10.0.0` → syft scan reports AGPL-3.0-or-later → denylist hit → verdict=fail → PR blocked → engineer swaps to mupdf → re-scan → verdict=pass.

section.title: Final artefact
